## How it was tested

<!-- Commands you ran + results. e.g. `mvn -pl common test`, `npx tsc --noEmit`,
     `./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin`, `node --test`, manual steps. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused on a single logical change
- [ ] Tests pass for the affected plane; new behavior has a test
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, config, or the API changed
- [ ] **Agent contract:** no breaking change to `/agent/v1` (additive-only — see ADR-0009), or a new `/agent/v2` is introduced
- [ ] UI changes include a screenshot / clip below
